continuation_request.label: artifact-wake
continuation_request.purpose: Write the final artifact from framework-bound state.

declared_losses: The 0.10 quality margin is declared, not learned from data, so non-inferiority claims are bounded by that threshold rather than empirically derived.
Scheduler observability is reported separately from artifact quality; the framework does not support claims that couple the two into a single composite judgment.
Provider or transport failures render runs inconclusive — they cannot be interpreted as evidence of model inferiority, only as gaps in the comparison record.
parsed.work_plan: Synthesize from the three evidence records: (1) the declared 0.10 margin constrains what non-inferiority can claim, (2) observability is structurally separate from quality, and (3) provider failures yield inconclusive runs, not inferiority proofs. The synthesis note will articulate the boundary between what the event-loop append-only comparison can assert and what it must reserve as uncertain or outside scope.
